title: HIVE Run Manifest
description: Schema for .hive-run/manifest.json — indexes the artifacts of a completed run bundle

bundle_version.description: Version of the run bundle format

protocol_version.description: Protocol version used for this run

schema_version.description: Schema version used for this run

run_id.description: Unique run identifier matching the run contract

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the run was created

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the run was completed

adapter.description: Adapter identifier used for this run

execution_mode.description: Execution mode used for this run

artifact_index.description: Index of artifacts produced by the run

integrity_available.description: Whether integrity verification data is available for the bundle
